redstoneguard.screen.title: Active Farms Detected!
redstoneguard.config.title: Protect My Redstone Configuration
redstoneguard.config.enabled.tooltip: When enabled, a warning screen appears if you try to log out while active farms are detected in any loaded chunk.
redstoneguard.config.threshold.tooltip: How many active indicators must be found before the warning is shown.
redstoneguard.config.countdown.tooltip: Seconds to wait before the Leave World button becomes available.
Toggles if moving pistons count towards the total.
redstoneguard.config.components.comparat: Toggles if powered comparators count towards the total.
redstoneguard.config.components.repeater: Toggles if powered repeaters count towards the total.
redstoneguard.config.components.observer: Toggles if powered observers count towards the total.
redstoneguard.config.components.poweredR: Toggles if active powered rails count towards the total.
redstoneguard.config.components.detector: Toggles if detector rails with a minecart on them count towards the total.
redstoneguard.config.components.sculkSen: Toggles if active sculk sensors and calibrated sculk sensors count towards the total.
